_comment: Vision-LLM routing for the wizard's auto-play and visual-evaluator paths. Per CLAUDE.md RULE #1, the priority list of preferred Ollama vision models lives here so we can retune without a Swift rebuild. Loader: AutoPlayPolicyContent.swift (Phase 0d.24/0d.26). Edit + git push + (relaunch OR refreshMchataisourceCache) ships changes.
_priorityRationale: Newest/strongest at structured visual reasoning first, then fallbacks. Match is by substring (case-insensitive) so version suffixes (`:8b`, `:latest`) hit the same priority entry. The first installed match wins.
_preferOllamaOverCloudComment: When true: Ollama vision (if any model installed) runs FIRST in the cascade, cloud (Google/OpenAI/Anthropic) is fallback. When false: cloud first (legacy behavior). Default true so cheap-routing users get free local inference.
_fallbackToCloudComment: If Ollama vision fails (model crashed, daemon unreachable mid-call, output unparseable), cascade to cloud APIs that have keys configured. When false: hard-fail with the local error so the user knows local broke. Default true for resilience.

hardwareTierRecommendations._comment: Suggested model per Mac RAM tier — surfaced in the no-vision-model-installed error message so users get a copy-pasteable command. Not used at runtime (auto-detection picks whichever is installed); pure UX guidance.

8gb.rationale: Fast, lightweight, specifically tuned for screenshots/UI. Comfortable on 8GB even with other apps.

16gb.rationale: moondream is the safe default. qwen3-vl:8b works but leaves <3GB headroom on 16GB once macOS + Slack + browser are running.

32gb.rationale: Best balance of quality + speed for typical Mac. Strong at structured visual reasoning.

64gb_plus.rationale: Top quality. Fits alongside qwen3-coder:30b in 64GB with room to spare.

_visionModelCacheTTLComment: How long the auto-detect caches the picked vision model. Re-probing Ollama /api/tags every vision call adds ~50ms; 60s strikes a balance for picking up newly-pulled models without spamming the daemon.
